SEARCH
Module overrungl.opengl
Package overrungl.opengl

Interface GL14C

All Superinterfaces:
overrun.marshal.DirectAccess
All Known Subinterfaces:
GL, GLLegacy
public interface GL14C extends overrun.marshal.DirectAccess
The OpenGL 1.4 forward compatible functions.

These extensions are promoted in this version:

  • GL_ARB_imaging
  • GL_ARB_point_parameters
  • GL_ARB_shadow
  • GL_ARB_texture_mirrored_repeat
Since:
0.1.0
Author:
squid233
